bead.title: web: implement node-wide worker workbench and project worker dispatch
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Operators need a single web pane showing every worker across local projects, plus ergonomic project-scoped controls to start and stop autonomous ddx work workers.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md:157 specifies `/nodes/:nodeId/workers`, but `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/workers/+page.svelte` is absent.
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/workers/+layout.svelte:57 derives running drain count only from `data.workers` for one project.
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/workers/+layout.svelte:115 starts a single worker through `startWorker` and has no count-aware form.
- docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/TP-002-server-web-ui.md:320 requires node-wide worker rows with project badge, current bead, phase, route/model, elapsed time, and freshness.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add the node-wide worker route and load function for `/nodes/:nodeId/workers`.
- Render all registered-project workers with node/project badges, state, current bead id/title, attempt id, phase, route/model, elapsed, freshness, and mode.
- Add detail navigation/drawer behavior with recent events, output, prompt, current bead link, attempt link, and stop action.
- Update project worker controls to request count, mode, harness/profile/effort, idle interval, and label filter through the GraphQL mutation once server support lands.
- Keep polling fallback or subscriptions for live row updates.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement federation forwarding in this bead beyond reading/displaying fields already exposed by the local or federated query layer. Do not implement Axon or managed-node outbound control.
bead.acceptance:
1. `/nodes/:nodeId/workers` exists and renders workers from at least two registered local projects.
2. Worker rows include project badge, worker id, state, current bead id/title, attempt id, phase, route/model, elapsed time, freshness, and command mode.
3. Worker detail shows recent phase events, captured output, prompt, attempt id, current bead link, and stop action.
4. Project worker controls can request `count=2`, mode, optional label filter, and show workers.max_count refusal.
5. Named Playwright tests from `workers-single-pane.spec.ts` and `workers-dispatch.spec.ts` pass.
6. `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run check` passes.
7. `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/workers-single-pane.spec.ts e2e/workers-dispatch.spec.ts` passes.
8. `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/server/...` passes.
9. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
